title: Create: Northstar-Aeronautics Compatibility
description: This mod adds a block named Dimensional Drive which, when attached on a physics object, has a GUI to select a destination planet form Create: Northstar. It teleports the physics contraption and the player on the selected planet. No crafting recipie yet.
body:
**Create: Northstar–Aeronautics Compatibility** is a lightweight addon that bridges Create Aeronautics physics vehicles with Create Northstar’s planetary travel system, making Aeronautics crafts far more exciting and capable.

This addon introduces a new functional block — the Dimensional Drive — which allows physics entities to travel between planets in a seamless, immersive way.

---

**Dimensional Drive**
Interplanetary Travel for Physics Crafts
- it is a custom block, featuring a GUI where you select your destination planet (as seen in screenshot 3).  
- When your physics entity reaches Y = 1750 at low vertical speed, the Drive automatically transfers the craft to the chosen planet.  
- Designed to feel natural within Create’s engineering style while enabling true spaceflight gameplay.

Note:  
The Dimensional Drive does not include a crafting recipe, giving modpack creators and server owners the freedom to add their own recipe via datapack.

---

**Admin Tools**
For testing, debugging, or creative setups, the mod includes:

- /drivetransfer {planet}  
  Instantly teleports you to the specified planet as long as you are seated on a physics entity.

**Purpose of the Mod**
The goal of this addon is simple:  
Make Create Aeronautics physics objects more fun, more interactive, and more powerful by enabling interplanetary travel.

Whether you're building rockets, shuttles, or chaotic flying machines, this mod turns them into true spacefaring vehicles.
